# opnsense_trafficshaper_queue (Resource)

Manages a traffic shaper queue on OPNsense.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `pipe` (String) UUID of the parent pipe.
- `weight` (Number) Queue weight (1-100).

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this queue is enabled.
- `mask` (String) Dynamic queue mask: none, src-ip, dst-ip.
- `number` (Number) Queue number (auto-assigned by OPNsense).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier.
